hints.text: Everything on a web page is visible, even things not displayed.
Right-click → View Page Source on the login page.
There's a downloadable zip on the dashboard. Files can hide more than they show.
Check the EXIF metadata of images inside the zip — tools like ExifTool or strings can extract embedded text.
Once you have SSH access, look at what commands have been run on the system.
Bash stores every command typed. Try: cat .bash_history — or just: history
